descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Humboldt Broncos 5–3 in Abbott Cup western final playoff game Sunday.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes defeated Saskatchewan's Humboldt Broncos 5–3 on Sunday at Richmond Arena in an Abbott Cup western final game. Dave Tomlinson scored the winning goal as Richmond secured a berth in the Centennial Cup national championships. Coach Orland Kurtenbach's team is guaranteed entry to the Canadian junior-A championships as Humboldt is hosting the national event, but Richmond aims to earn the title outright rather than entering "through the back door."

attribution.headline: Sockeyes grab series lead with split of weekend action
